title: Question management core types
purpose: Defines the fundamental data structures for representing questions, answers, and submission states in the Claude question management system.
module_context: Exports three core interface types: Question for representing questions with id, text, optional context, and timestamp; QuestionResponse for answer responses with questionId, answer text, and timestamp; and QuestionSubmitState for tracking submission progress with loading status, error messages, and success indicators.

steps.content: Define the structure for a question with required id and text fields.
Include optional context field for additional question details.
Add required timestamp field for question creation tracking.
Define the structure for a question response with required questionId and answer fields.
Add required timestamp field for response creation tracking.
Define the structure for tracking question submission state with loading status.
Include optional error field for storing error messages.
Add success field for indicating submission completion status.
